author: sleepyhauru
description: Save guild and global media so the bot can upload them later by trigger name.
end_user_data_statement:
This cog stores attachments uploaded by users so the bot can re-upload them later.
Users may delete their own data with or without making a data request.
install_msg: Use `[p]addimage` to review saved media. Add guild media with `[p]addimage add <name>`, or owner-managed global media with `[p]addimage addglobal <name>`.
name: AddImage
short: Save media for direct upload per guild and globally.
